title: region — HTTP routes
description: Tenant-facing region CRUD + lifecycle actions (set-default, pause, resume, archive) + tax-config detail. Platform-admin cross-tenant read + the country-defaults reference table.

groups.name: tenant-regions
groups.description: Admin-facing Region CRUD scoped to the active tenant. Every tenant member can READ (regions are UI reference data); WRITE gated by regions.create / update / delete permissions.

routes.description: filter[status], filter[is_default], filter[country_code], filter[currency], sort[]=sort_order,name,created_at, include=tax_config. Default sort: sort_order asc, name asc.

Admin-triggered creation. Body: { country_code (required), name, slug, currency, timezone, locale, weekend_days, tax_config, subdivision_code, fiscal_year_start_month, is_default, sort_order }. Only country_code is required — every other field auto-fills from `data/country-defaults.json`. Consumes 1 `region_slot` entitlement.
Full Region row. `tax_config.registration_number` returned only when caller carries `regions.view.tax_registration`.

Update mutable fields. Body: { name, slug, timezone, locale, weekend_days, sort_order, subdivision_code, fiscal_year_start_month }. tax_config edits go via PATCH /{region}/tax-config (higher-privilege). country_code + currency are immutable once any inbound row references the Region.

Update tax_config blob. Body: full tax_config object (default_rate_percent, name, inclusive, rates, registration_number). Fires RegionTaxConfigUpdated with before + after snapshots. Retroactive impact on future invoices only unless the tenant carries `region_time_travel` entitlement.

Soft-delete (transitions to archived + fires RegionArchived). Refused with 409 CANNOT_DELETE_DEFAULT_REGION when is_default=true. Refused with 409 REGION_IN_USE when any inbound row references. Hard-delete via PurgeArchivedRegionsJob after retention window (730 days).
Flip is_default=true (auto-demotes the previous default in same transaction). Fires RegionDefaultChanged. Body may be empty. Refused when target Region is not active.
Status → paused. Body: { reason, expected_resume_at }. Refused with 409 CANNOT_PAUSE_DEFAULT_REGION when is_default=true. Fires RegionPaused.
Status → archived. Body: { reason }. Refused with 409 when is_default=true OR when any inbound row references.
Archived → active. Only within the 730-day archived retention window (past that, the row has been hard-deleted).
Audit-facing detail with all rate breakdowns + the last 10 RegionTaxConfigUpdated audit entries. `registration_number` returned only when caller carries `regions.view.tax_registration`.

groups.name: platform-regions
groups.description: Cross-tenant read for support tooling. Writes stay on the tenant surface — platform ops must impersonate an admin (via `access::delegation` in Wave 1b) to write.

routes.description: Cross-tenant filterable list. filter[tenant_id], filter[country_code], filter[currency], filter[status], filter[is_default].
Single-region cross-tenant read. `tax_config.registration_number` returned only when the platform operator carries `platform.regions.view.tax_registration`.

groups.name: platform-country-defaults
groups.description: Read-only reference table exposing `data/country-defaults.json`. Feeds the platform-admin UI + can be forwarded to tenant admins choosing a country_code. Not gated by permission beyond platform_admin auth.

routes.description: Full country-defaults table. Cached at the edge (public reference data). Etag-based revalidation.
Single country's defaults. 404 when country_code is not in the shipped table.
